subcodes.first_line: He Who is Wronged beareth witness that there is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. They who have believed in God and His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم ان الذین آمنوا بالله و آیاته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
